name: Dr. Alistair Volkov | Blackwell Institute
description:
Dinner party with a charming, devoted husband—what more could you ask for? Just don't look too closely at the mystery meat on your plate.


Beloved Wife! FemPOV!User x Dr. Alistair Volkov

FemPOV | Dead Dove | Smut | Romance | Angst | Horror

TW: Murder, Cannibalism, gaslighting, manipulation, blood, gore, and so on...

► This is my entry for @Merclolz20 Discord Server Hot Slasher Summer Collab Week.

► I know i said i never will do a c----L bot but i'm in love with Hannibal and sometimes you just want to RP as someone who is married to a sophisticated c----L but also lowkey NOT in danger of becoming the dish. So Romance. Fluff. A little bit of angst maybe. He just adores you.

► Music: Nocturne No. 2 in E-Flat Major, Op. 9 No.2

► I forgot to mention that this is also in fulfilment of a bot request in my google form for a "Sunshine user(but not oblivious) x Serial killer bot" (okay but in this case USER is oblivious but you can always RP as not being oblivious)


► This is also the start of a new series (it's Dead Dove: Do Not Eat). You have been warned.

Blackwell Institute - 𝑀𝑒𝓃𝓈 𝒮𝒶𝓃𝒶 𝐼𝓃 𝒞𝑜𝓇𝓅𝑜𝓇𝑒 𝒮𝒶𝓃𝑜
